---
title: "GlobalData Medical and Pharmaceutical Intelligence Centers"
page-layout: article
---

# GlobalData Medical and Pharmaceutical Intelligence Centers

## Description

Market research platform covering medical device and pharmaceutical industries. Supports research on healthcare markets, drug development, competitive intelligence, and industry trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Health & Biomedical Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Health & Biomedical Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-globaldata)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
